sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79411" key="parecagwgh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεξ-ᾰγωγή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79411.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">march past</tr_>, of athletes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
